findings.detail: Only one template choice, so it feels like I’m not really choosing a design.
findings.proposed_solution: Show 3–5 clear starter templates so I can pick a look that fits my business.

findings.detail: The editor gives me very little guidance on what to do first.
findings.proposed_solution: Add a simple first-step prompt like ‘Start here: choose a template, then edit your text.’

findings.detail: The chat is there, but it isn’t clear what I should ask it for.
findings.proposed_solution: Make the chat more obvious with example questions like ‘change colors’ or ‘rewrite my homepage headline.’

findings.detail: Save works, but I’d want more obvious confirmation that my changes are actually saved.
findings.proposed_solution: Show a stronger save confirmation, like ‘Saved’ with a timestamp or checkmark.

findings.detail: The device toggle is useful, but it may add one more thing to figure out in an already unfamiliar editor.
findings.proposed_solution: Keep the device preview, but label it plainly as ‘Desktop / Tablet / Mobile’ so it feels less technical.
